Driver Mobile App MOCKUP Learn

This page shows the mobile app experience for drivers during trip execution. The app guides drivers through each milestone, collects required data (photos, signatures, readings), and communicates with the TMS in real-time.

Trip
Steps
Money
Profile
Driver App Specification Notes
Data Capture at Each Milestone
  • Vehicle inspection: 4 photos (front, back, left, right)
  • Loading: Cargo photos + weight slip photo
  • En-route: GPS auto-tracked
  • POD: Receiver name, phone, signature, min 4 photos
Offline Capability
  • Offline photo capture with sync when online
  • Expense entry works offline
  • POD submission queued if no connectivity
  • GPS breadcrumb stored locally, batched upload
